name: Nintendo
description: Japanese game company and console manufacturer. Creator of Mario, Zelda, Metroid, Pokémon, and many of gaming's most important franchises.

eras.title: Toy and Card Era
eras.description: Pre-video-game period of playing cards, toys, and entertainment products.

eras.title: Arcade and Game & Watch Era
eras.description: Nintendo's transition into electronic games, arcade releases, and handheld LCD games.

eras.title: Famicom / NES Era
eras.description: Console-market breakthrough and creation of Nintendo's core franchises.

eras.title: Super Nintendo and Game Boy Era
3D Transition Era
eras.description: Nintendo 64, GameCube, Game Boy Advance, and the move to 3D franchise design.

eras.title: Blue Ocean Era
eras.description: Nintendo DS and Wii broaden the gaming audience.

eras.title: Hybrid Era
eras.description: Switch-era convergence of handheld and console development.

notes: Ape is not contained here; it is modeled as a separate minor company that later became Creatures.
